description: 30 regular trivia + 30 CAH-style dark humor clues about surprise parties, unexpected gifts, birthday surprises

style_notes.regular_clues: Science and psychology-based clues about surprise parties, gift-giving, and cognitive science
style_notes.cah_clues: Dark humor, mainstream references (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Venmo, Target, etc), real-world party disasters
cah_principles_applied: SHORT & PUNCHY - Most clues fit on one line
MAINSTREAM REFERENCES - Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Venmo, Target, Whole Foods, Uber, strip clubs
UNEXPECTED CONNECTIONS - Setup/punchline structure with dark humor
RELATABLE DISASTERS - Things that actually happen at surprise parties
NO RANDOM SHOCK - Crude references connect logically to the setup
BOOMER TEST - Most parents would get the Instagram/Facebook/party planning references
